modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: HP printer displaying 49.4C02 error during operation

full_description_text: The user was trying to print when they encountered a 49.4C02 error on their HP printer. This error seems to have interrupted their printing task unexpectedly. They mentioned it happened right after sending a document to print, which is kinda frustrating.
short_description: HP printer displaying 49.4C02 error during operation
description: The user was trying to print when they encountered a 49.4C02 error on their HP printer. This error seems to have interrupted their printing task unexpectedly. They mentioned it happened right after sending a document to print, which is kinda frustrating.
